name: Border Dungeon 边境地牢
short_description: "Border Dungeon" is an incremental adventure game where players choose from warrior, mage, or rogue classes. They battle monsters and bosses in endless dungeons, upgrading skills and gear for endless adventure fun.
detailed_description:
Game Introduction
Border Dungeon is a semi-idle game designed for players who enjoy strategic combinations and casual gameplay. In this challenging dungeon world, players can choose from three unique classes: Warrior, Mage, or Rogue. Each class has its own skill tree and talent tree, making every game experience fresh and strategic.

Explore the Endless Dungeon
The dungeon is infinite, allowing players to continually challenge higher difficulty levels. Each level features different monsters and layouts waiting to test the players. By defeating the dungeon bosses, players can gain abundant experience and equipment upgrades, enabling them to continuously strengthen themselves and challenge even higher levels.

Class Development and Equipment Collection
Players can choose different classes, each with diverse development paths. In addition to continuously enhancing skills and talents, players can also strengthen their power by collecting equipment. Different sets and equipment combinations will offer various tactical options, making battles more varied and exciting.

Attributes and Growth
Character growth in the game depends on five main attributes and four secondary attributes. These attributes directly affect the core combat abilities of the characters, such as health, attack power, and mana. Secondary attributes influence combat performance, such as increasing attack speed, critical hit chance, multi-hit capabilities, and enhancing specific skill effects.

Players can enhance these attributes through equipment, skills, and talents, optimizing and combining them according to their strategic needs, forming unique combat styles. Each attribute optimization and combination will have a profound impact on the character's performance in the dungeon.

Relic System
In-game coins can be used to purchase various relics that significantly enhance idle growth efficiency. Relic functions include automatically casting skills, refreshing monsters, and increasing idle rewards. These features greatly facilitate player growth during online periods, allowing players to enjoy the fun and sense of accomplishment even during their busy lives.

Border Dungeon is not just a game requiring strategy and skill, but also an excellent choice for players to enjoy growth and adventure in a casual setting. Ready to face the challenges of the dungeon? Come and create your own hero!
